Contents

  • Terminally Deprecated

  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.BitvectorFormulaManager.extract(BitvectorFormula, int, int, boolean)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.BitvectorFormulaManager.modulo(BitvectorFormula, BitvectorFormula, boolean)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointFormulaManager.castTo(FloatingPointFormula, FormulaType<T>)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointFormulaManager.castTo(FloatingPointFormula, FormulaType<T>, FloatingPointRoundingMode)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointFormulaManager.makeNumber(BigInteger, BigInteger, boolean, FormulaType.FloatingPointType)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.DOUBLE_PRECISION_EXPONENT_SIZE
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.DOUBLE_PRECISION_MANTISSA_SIZE
    this constant can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this constant does not.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.getMantissaSize()
    this method can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this does not. Use FloatingPointNumber.getMantissaSizeWithoutHiddenBit() instead if you want the mantissa without the hidden bit, and FloatingPointNumber.getMantissaSizeWithHiddenBit() if you want it to include the hidden bit.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.getSign()
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.of(boolean, BigInteger, BigInteger, int, int)
    Use FloatingPointNumber.of(Sign, BigInteger, BigInteger, FloatingPointType) instead.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.of(String, int, int)
    Use FloatingPointNumber.of(String, FloatingPointType) instead.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.of(FloatingPointNumber.Sign, BigInteger, BigInteger, int, int)
    Use FloatingPointNumber.of(Sign, BigInteger, BigInteger, FloatingPointType) instead.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.SINGLE_PRECISION_EXPONENT_SIZE
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.SINGLE_PRECISION_MANTISSA_SIZE
    this constant can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this constant does not.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FormulaType.FloatingPointType.getMantissaSize()
    this method can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this does not. Use FormulaType.FloatingPointType.getMantissaSizeWithoutHiddenBit() instead if you want the mantissa without the hidden bit, and FormulaType.FloatingPointType.getMantissaSizeWithHiddenBit() if you want it to include the hidden bit.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FormulaType.getFloatingPointType(int, int)
    this method can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this method expects the mantissa argument without the hidden bit. Use FormulaType.getFloatingPointTypeFromSizesWithoutHiddenBit(int, int) instead if you want to construct a FormulaType.FloatingPointType with the constructing method treating the mantissa argument without the hidden bit, and FormulaType.getFloatingPointTypeFromSizesWithHiddenBit(int, int) if you want it to include the hidden bit in the size of the mantissa argument.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.DOUBLE_PRECISION_EXPONENT_SIZE
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.DOUBLE_PRECISION_MANTISSA_SIZE
    this constant can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this constant does not.

    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.SINGLE_PRECISION_MANTISSA_SIZE
    this constant can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this constant does not.

    Method
    Description
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.BitvectorFormulaManager.extract(BitvectorFormula, int, int, boolean)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.BitvectorFormulaManager.modulo(BitvectorFormula, BitvectorFormula, boolean)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointFormulaManager.castTo(FloatingPointFormula, FormulaType<T>)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointFormulaManager.castTo(FloatingPointFormula, FormulaType<T>, FloatingPointRoundingMode)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointFormulaManager.makeNumber(BigInteger, BigInteger, boolean, FormulaType.FloatingPointType)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.getMantissaSize()
    this method can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this does not. Use FloatingPointNumber.getMantissaSizeWithoutHiddenBit() instead if you want the mantissa without the hidden bit, and FloatingPointNumber.getMantissaSizeWithHiddenBit() if you want it to include the hidden bit.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.getSign()
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.of(boolean, BigInteger, BigInteger, int, int)
    Use FloatingPointNumber.of(Sign, BigInteger, BigInteger, FloatingPointType) instead.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.of(String, int, int)
    Use FloatingPointNumber.of(String, FloatingPointType) instead.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FloatingPointNumber.of(FloatingPointNumber.Sign, BigInteger, BigInteger, int, int)
    Use FloatingPointNumber.of(Sign, BigInteger, BigInteger, FloatingPointType) instead.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FormulaType.FloatingPointType.getMantissaSize()
    this method can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this does not. Use FormulaType.FloatingPointType.getMantissaSizeWithoutHiddenBit() instead if you want the mantissa without the hidden bit, and FormulaType.FloatingPointType.getMantissaSizeWithHiddenBit() if you want it to include the hidden bit.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.FormulaType.getFloatingPointType(int, int)
    this method can be confusing, as the SMTLIB2 standard expects the mantissa to include the hidden bit, but this method expects the mantissa argument without the hidden bit. Use FormulaType.getFloatingPointTypeFromSizesWithoutHiddenBit(int, int) instead if you want to construct a FormulaType.FloatingPointType with the constructing method treating the mantissa argument without the hidden bit, and FormulaType.getFloatingPointTypeFromSizesWithHiddenBit(int, int) if you want it to include the hidden bit in the size of the mantissa argument.
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.visitors.BooleanFormulaVisitor.visitBoundVar(BooleanFormula, int)
    org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api.visitors.FormulaVisitor.visitBoundVariable(Formula, int)
